titles.en: Reward of reciting Surah Mursalaat, Naba and Nazia’at

text: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو الرُّمَّانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْمُرْسَلاتِ عُرْفاً عَرَّفَ اللَّهُ بَیْنَهُ وَ بَیْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ عَمَّ یَتَساءَلُونَ لَمْ تَخْرُجْ سَنَتُهُ إِذَا کَانَ یُدْمِنُهَا کُلَّ یَوْمٍ حَتَّی یَزُورَ بَیْتَ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ وَ النَّازِعَاتِ لَمْ یَمُتْ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یَبْعَثْهُ اللَّهُ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یُدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّهَ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. ’Amru al-Rummani from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Whoever recites it, it becomes a way of sincerity and a means of affection between him and Prophet Muhammad (s.a.w.s.). If one recites “Amma Yatasaa-aloon” (Surah Naba) daily for one year a year would not pass but he would have the honor of paying homage to the Holy House of Allah, if Allah wills. One who recites Surah Nazia’at, would not die except as cheerful and hearty, and Allah would not raise him from the grave but in happy and pleasant state, and he would not enter Paradise except as happy and joyful.”
